_meta.purpose: Calibration anchors for the piecewise map projection (docs/map/TORONTO-MAP-SPEC-v2.md §2). Regenerate derived world coords from these — never hand-tune twice.
_meta.method: Two researcher rounds (Haiku + web search). Round 1 (latitude.to) failed the orchestrator's monotonic-longitude sanity gate along Yonge; round 2 re-verified every station against Wikidata and filled non-station corners via named-landmark proxies (tools/research/out/round2-*.json). Merge reviewed by orchestrator; disagreements > 0.002° resolved toward Wikidata.

status_key.needs_agent: unverified — re-run researcher (Phase 22 may fill from OSM road data instead)

_meta.notes: yonge-steeles lies OFF the playable polygon (capsule top edge is ~380 m north of Finch); it exists to extend the Yonge-centreline longitude function to the map's top edge and for the '↑ Steeles Ave' signpost — exclude it from on-map anchor tests.

anchors.name: Yonge St & Steeles Ave
anchors.notes: Off-map centreline extension point (see _meta.notes). Single-source (latitude.to); passes ordering sanity vs Finch.

anchors.name: Yonge St & Eglinton Ave
anchors.notes: Round-1 latitude.to value placed Eglinton east of St Clair (impossible); corrected by Wikidata.

anchors.name: Yonge St & Front St
anchors.proxy: Hockey Hall of Fame, 30 Yonge St
anchors.notes: Landmark proxy at the true corner; single non-Wikidata source but passes ordering sanity between King and Queens Quay.

anchors.name: Yonge St & Queens Quay
anchors.notes: Round-1 single source; retained because it passes ordering sanity (south of Front, north of shore, lon between both).

anchors.name: Queen St W & Bathurst St
anchors.proxy: Occident Hall / CB2 building, 651 Queen St W (identified, coords unconfirmed)
anchors.notes: Tolerance-check anchor only (not calibration). Phase 22 may fill from OSM road polylines.

anchors.name: Queen St W & Spadina Ave
anchors.proxy: 441-443 Queen St W (search gave ~43.653/-79.398, unverified — not accepted)
anchors.notes: Tolerance-check anchor only (not calibration). Phase 22 may fill from OSM road polylines.

anchors.name: Queen St W & University Ave
anchors.notes: Proxy centroid sits east of the University Ave centreline — allow wide (±80 wu) tolerance.

anchors.name: Queen St & Bay St
anchors.proxy: Old City Hall, 60 Queen St W
anchors.notes: Proxy spans Bay→James; centroid west of Bay centreline — allow wide (±80 wu) tolerance.
